appInfo.name: OnRoute
appInfo.subtitle: Find stops ranked by detour time
appInfo.contentRights: This app does not contain third-party content that requires rights.

appVersion.whatsNew: Initial release! Search for places along your route, ranked by detour time. Features: detour-ranked results, max-detour slider, place photos, saved routes, search history, and navigation handoff to Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze.

description:
OnRoute shows you places along your driving route, ranked by how little time they add to your trip.

Enter where you're going, pick what you need — coffee, food, gas, groceries, pharmacy, or EV charging — and instantly see every option sorted by detour time. "+2 min" beats "+15 min."

KEY FEATURES:

• Ranked by detour time: Every result shows exactly how many minutes it adds to your trip
• Max-detour slider: Set your time budget — "only show places adding less than 5 minutes"
• Place photos: See what each place looks like before you stop
• Saved routes: Save your commute and search with one tap
• Forward-only results: Never see places behind you on the route
• Visual detour preview: Tap any result to see the A → B → C route on the map
• One-tap navigation: Open the route in Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze
• Six categories: Coffee, Food, Gas, Grocery, Pharmacy, EV Charging

PERFECT FOR:
• Daily commuters who want a quick coffee stop
• Parents picking up dinner on the way home
• Road trippers planning efficient stops
• Anyone who's ever thought "I wish I could find something good without going too far off my route"

Google Maps shows you what's nearby. OnRoute shows you what's worth the stop.

dataTypes.collection: When user taps Current Location button
Anonymous search events and feature usage
Optional in-app signup for product updates
